data.title: Cumulus Media is set to discuss Q2 2025 results in a conference call on August 7 at 8:30 AM ET after a press release at 8:00 AM ET.
data.description: Cumulus Media Inc. (OTCQB: CMLS) is set to conduct a conference call on Thursday, August 7th at 8:30 AM Eastern Time to review its performance in the second quarter of 2025. Before the call, at around 8:00 AM ET, they will release a press statement outlining the key outcomes. This event provides stakeholders with insights into the company's operational figures and achievements during the specified period.

data.title: Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: KNSA) to report Q2 2025 financial results on July 29, 2025, through a conference call.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals International, plc (Nasdaq: KNSA) disclosed plans to hold a conference call and live webcast on July 29, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of this event is to present the financial results for the second quarter of 2025 and discuss recent portfolio developments.

data.title: Celcuity begins Phase 3 trial VIKTORIA-2 for HR+/HER2- breast cancer with gedatolisib, targeting all PI3K isoforms.
data.description: Celcuity Inc. disclosed that the Phase 3 clinical trial VIKTORIA-2 has commenced with the dosing of the inaugural patient. The trial is investigating the efficacy of gedatolisib in conjunction with a CDK4/6 inhibitor and fulvestrant as a first-line therapy for individuals with HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer resistant to endocrine therapy. Gedatolisib, an experimental multi-target PI3K/AKT/mTOR inhibitor, is being studied for its potential to effectively target all four class I PI3K isoforms, mTORC1, and mTORC2, offering comprehensive inhibition of the PAM pathway. Celcuity Inc., a biotechnology company focused on developing targeted oncology treatments, is trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CELC.

data.title: Columbia Banking System, Inc. reports Q2 2025 results: $152M net income, $160M operating net income, $0.73 EPS, $0.76 diluted EPS. CEO comments on profitability focus.
data.description: In Tacoma, Washington, on July 24, 2025, a company reported financial results indicating a net income of $152 million and an operating net income of $160 million. The earnings per common share were $0.73, and the operating earnings per common share were $0.76. The CEO commented on the results, highlighting a focus on profitability during the second quarter.

data.title: Warburg Pincus and Berkshire Partners finalize acquisition of TRIUMPH, a leading aerospace provider (NYSE: TGI).
data.description: A privately-owned company based in Radnor, Pennsylvania, along with offices in New York and Boston, declared on July 24, 2025, that Triumph Group, Inc. (NYSE: TGI) will persist as a top supplier of vital aerospace systems and components. The completion of the announcement solidifies Triumph's position as an independent entity in the market.

data.title: New Brunswick-based Magyar Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGYR) announced a 46% increase in net income for the three months ending June 30, 2025, declaring a dividend.
data.description: Magyar Bancorp, the parent company of Magyar Bank, disclosed its financial performance for the three and nine months ending on June 30, 2025. The company, listed as MGYR on NASDAQ, noted a significant 46% upsurge in its net income for the three-month period. This positive growth showcases the Company's strong financial position and strategic management.

data.title: South Atlantic Bancshares, Inc. reported earnings of $0.48 per share with $3.7 million net income for Q2 2025.
data.description: Myrtle Beach, South Carolina - On July 24, 2025, South Atlantic Bancshares, Inc. (OTCQX: SABK), the parent company of South Atlantic Bank, announced a consolidated net income of $3.7 million for the second quarter. This amounts to $0.48 per diluted common share.

data.title: Scholastic's Q4 and FY 2025 results show strong performance, with adjusted EBITDA in line with guidance, over $90M returned to shareholders, aiming for profit growth in FY 2026.
data.description: Successful implementation and efficient cost control led to achieving Adjusted EBITDA as per the initial forecast. Shareholders were provided with over $90 million in returns throughout the fiscal year. The focus is on achieving substantial profit growth in Fiscal 2026 through effective cost management. The company is targeting a strong performance for the upcoming year.

data.title: Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) reports strong growth in Q2 2025, focused on long-term value creation.
data.description: Lancaster, Pennsylvania, July 24, 2025 - Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) announced robust growth driven by strategic portfolio adjustments, aiming to enhance long-term value creation. The company disclosed its latest financial report, showcasing positive outcomes for the second quarter.

data.title: Provident Financial Services, Inc. (NYSE:PFS) declares $0.24 quarterly cash dividend, payable on Aug 29, to stockholders as of Aug 15.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Iselin, N.J., Provident Financial Services, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid on August 29, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 15, 2025. The Company’s Board of Directors at NYSE:PFS approved this distribution for the benefit of its investors.

data.title: Celestia (TIA) dips 4.32% to $1.88 post Ethereum integration, testing critical $1.87 support with neutral RSI.
data.description: Despite a significant integration with Ethereum rollup, the price of TIA has experienced a 4.32% decrease, reaching $1.88. There is a key pivot level at $1.87 being tested, along with neutral RSI indicating a possible reversal zone.

data.title: Exactech updates reorganization plan, reaches agreement with Unsecured Creditors. Court date set for early September.
data.description: In early September, Exactech, a renowned global medical technology company, is set to have a court date for the confirmation of its reorganization plan and approval of sale. On July 24, 2025, the company filed its revised plan with the Court after successfully negotiating with the Unsecured Creditors. This development marks a significant step in the company's restructuring process, signaling a potential resolution to the financial challenges it faces. Stay tuned for updates on this evolving situation.
